race.description: The Violet Little Memorial Cup Hcp (Bm60)
race.comment: TUESDAY (7) registered her first win last start over 1200m at this track, getting home by a nose. Nozi Tomizawa was in the saddle on that occasion and retains the mount. This is tougher but she cannot be underestimated. SWITCHBLADE (2) settled well back but hit the line well to finish fourth, beaten 2.25 lengths, over 1300m here last time. Shapes as one of the main contenders. Former NSW galloper TARTAN TIGER (5) resumes here for the new stable but should find this easier than what she faced down south. Respect any market confidence. POWER PACK (1) is back from a let-up but has placed in a trial and owns a decent record here.
